text.title: Indie Hacker Tax and Legal Essentials Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply Indie Hacker Tax and Legal Essentials end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, output, and (where relevant) a decision-gate.

step.name: pin-residency
step.action: Record tax-residency country + region; cite registration evidence.

step.name: pick-entity
step.action: Choose entity type (sole-trader / LLC / Ltd); record rationale + registration ID.
step.decision-gate: If revenue >$50K/yr, escalate entity choice to accountant.

step.name: publish-tos-privacy
step.action: Publish /terms + /privacy from template; cite processor list.

step.name: collect-processors
step.action: List every data processor with purpose + jurisdiction.

step.name: book-lawyer-review
step.action: Book 30-60 min lawyer review on the finalised inventory.
